attributes.Sql Query:
/* Partner enrich having split and multiple matches */ 
 
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
/*CASE 
	WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'N' THEN '8 - MULTIPLE PL RULE MATCH-BKGS APPLIED' 
    --WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'Y' THEN '9 - MATCH ON NAMED ACCOUNT + PL' 
END */
NULL AS REASON_DESCR,
SPLIT AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
LEAF_TERR_ID AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
FIN_ADJ_KEY,
PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
ENRICH_NODE.REASON_DESCR AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	PLN.*, 
	SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ORDER BY LEAF_TERR_ID ) SPLIT_SUM
	FROM
	(
		SELECT PR.*, 
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,SPLIT,PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER,PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ORDER BY LEAF_TERR_ID ) RN
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_DRR_PL_RULES_ENRICHMENT PR 
		WHERE 
		RK = 1 
		AND SPLIT <> 100 
		AND (SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) 
		AND (SALES_REP_NUMBER = PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER)
		AND PL_PROCESSED_FLG='N'
	) PLN  
	WHERE RN = 1 
) PR 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_NODE
ON ENRICH_NODE.BK_REASON_CD IN ('PL_MTPL_BKGS_TERR')
WHERE SPLIT_SUM = 100

/* Partner led enrich having multiple matches */ 
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY         ,
BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT ,
LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
REASON_DESC_END_CUST ,
/*CASE WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'N' THEN '8 - MULTIPLE PL RULE MATCH-BKGS APPLIED' 
     --WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'Y' THEN '9 - MATCH ON NAMED ACCOUNT + PL' 
END */
NULL AS REASON_DESCR ,
SPLIT AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT        ,
PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY ,
PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
LEAF_TERR_ID AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
FIN_ADJ_KEY,
PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
ENRICH_NODE.REASON_DESCR AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	PR.* , 
	ROW_NUMBER() 
	OVER(PARTITION BY BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ORDER BY LEAF_TERR_ID ) RN
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.WI_DRR_PL_RULES_ENRICHMENT PR 
	WHERE 
	RK = 1 
	AND SPLIT = 100 
	AND PL_PROCESSED_FLG='N' 
	AND (SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) 
	AND (SALES_REP_NUMBER = PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER)
) WI 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_NODE
ON ENRICH_NODE.BK_REASON_CD IN ('PL_MTPL_BKGS_TERR')
WHERE RN = 1

SELECT  
DISTINCT  BM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, 
BM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, 
BM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
BM.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
BM.SHIP_TO_CITY, 
BM.SHIP_TO_STATE,
BM.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD, 
BM.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD,
BM.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD, 
BM.END_CUST_CITY,
BM.END_CUST_STATE, 
BM.END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD,
BM.END_CUST_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD, 
BM.END_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
BM.BKGS_DISTRIBUTOR_ID,
PR.LEAF_TERR_ID,
PR.SHARE_COUNTRY_CD, 
PR.SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD,
PR.ABSOLUTE_RANK, 
PR.SPLIT,
PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
PR.POSTAL_CD_MAX_RANGE, 
PR.PGTMV_GEO_ID,
PR.END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID, 
PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE,
PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV, 
PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT,
PR.DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT, PR.END_SHIP_TO_STATE,
PR.DISTRIBUTOR_ID, 
RANK() OVER  
	(  PARTITION BY  BM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
	   ORDER BY  RANK_LEVEL1  ASC, RANK_LEVEL2  ASC, RANK_LEVEL3  ASC, RANK_LEVEL4  ASC, RANK_LEVEL5  ASC, 
	   RANK_LEVEL6  ASC, RANK_LEVEL7  ASC, RANK_LEVEL8  ASC, RANK_LEVEL9  ASC, 
	   RANK_LEVEL10 ASC, RANK_LEVEL11 ASC, RANK_LEVEL12 ASC   
	) AS RK, 
BM.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,  
BM.REASON_DESC_END_CUST, 
BM.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT, 
BM.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
BM.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
BM.HIBERNATION_FLG,   
PR.END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID, 
PR.END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID, 
PR.PGTMV_PARTNER_BE_ID,  
BM.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT,  
BM.SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_CD, 
BM.SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD,
'N' AS PL_PROCESSED_FLG,  --PL_PROCESSED_FLG will be updated to Y once the records have undergone PL Rules enrichment and loaded into final WI table
BM.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
BM.PROCESS_TYPE
FROM   
$$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_MSR_DENORM BM,   
$$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_PL_RULES_DENORM PR 
WHERE  PR.SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD  = BM.SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD 
 AND ( PR.PGTMV_GEO_ID IS NULL 
 OR ( BM.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT  = PR.PGTMV_GEO_ID ))  
 AND (( PR.END_SHIP_TO_STATE IS NULL  )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_STATE = PR.END_SHIP_TO_STATE) 
 OR BM.SHIP_TO_STATE = PR.END_SHIP_TO_STATE ) 
 AND ( (PR.END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID  IS NULL  )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD = PR.END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID )              
 OR ( BM.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD = PR.END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID ))  
 AND (( PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV  IS NULL )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_POSTAL_CD  = PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV)              
 OR ( BM.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD = PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV ))   
 AND (( BM.END_CUST_POSTAL_CD BETWEEN PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE AND PR.POSTAL_CD_MAX_RANGE              )
 OR (BM.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD BETWEEN PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE AND PR.POSTAL_CD_MAX_RANGE )
 OR ( PR.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE IS NULL ))  
 AND ( PR.DISTRIBUTOR_ID IS NULL  
 OR (BM.BKGS_DISTRIBUTOR_ID = PR.DISTRIBUTOR_ID ))  
 AND ((PR.DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT  IS NULL )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_POSTAL_CD LIKE PR.DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT)                
 OR (BM.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD LIKE PR.DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT))   
 AND ( PR.PGTMV_PARTNER_BE_ID  IS NULL 
 OR ( BM.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT  = PR.PGTMV_PARTNER_BE_ID )) 
 AND ((END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID  IS NULL )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_CITY = PR.END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID )              
 OR ( BM.SHIP_TO_CITY = PR.END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID ))  
 AND (( PR.END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID IS NULL )
 OR (BM.END_CUST_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD = PR.END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID )              
 OR ( BM.SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD = PR.END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID ))

/* partner led single match */ 
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
/*CASE 
	WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'N' THEN '7 - SINGLE MATCH ON PL RULES' 
	--WHEN HIBERNATION_FLG = 'Y' THEN '9 - MATCH ON NAMED ACCOUNT + PL' 
END*/ 
NULL  AS REASON_DESCR,
SPLIT AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
LEAF_TERR_ID AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
FIN_ADJ_KEY,
PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
ENRICH_NODE.REASON_DESCR AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_PL_RULES_ENRICHMENT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_NODE
ON ENRICH_NODE.BK_REASON_CD IN ('PL_SINGLE')
WHERE RK = 1 
AND ( BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE) IN 
( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_PL_RULES_ENRICHMENT 
  WHERE RK = 1 
  GROUP BY 1,2,3 
  HAVING COUNT(1) = 1 AND SUM(SPLIT) = 100 
  UNION 
  SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_PL_RULES_ENRICHMENT
  WHERE RK = 1  
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
  HAVING COUNT(1) > 1 AND SUM(SPLIT) = 100 
)

SELECT 
 ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, 
 ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE , 
 ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
 NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 MPH.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,       
 SHIP_TO.ERP_WIPS_CITY_NAME AS SHIP_TO_CITY,
 SHIP_TO.STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME AS SHIP_TO_STATE,
 SHIP_TO.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD AS SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD,
 SHIP_TO_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE AS SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD,
 SHIP_TO.ERP_WIPS_POSTAL_CD AS SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD,
 END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_CITY_NAME AS END_CUST_CITY,
 END_CUST.STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME AS END_CUST_STATE,
 END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD AS END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD,
 END_CUST_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE AS END_CUST_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD,
 END_CUST. ERP_WIPS_POSTAL_CD AS END_CUST_POSTAL_CD ,
 RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS SHARE_COUNTRY_CD,
 CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(SHARE_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE , 'UN') = 'UN'
   THEN RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ELSE SHARE_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 END AS SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD     ,     
 RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,    
 NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT AS BKGS_DISTRIBUTOR_ID  , 
 ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY , 
 ENRICH.REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST  ,
 -999 AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT , 
 -999 AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,  
 -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 'N' AS HIBERNATION_FLG ,  
 MPH.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT  , 
 SOLD_TO.ERP_WIPS_CITY_NAME AS SOLD_TO_CITY ,
 SOLD_TO.STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME AS SOLD_TO_STATE,
 SOLD_TO.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD AS SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_CD,
 SOLD_TO_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE AS SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CD,
 SOLD_TO.ERP_WIPS_POSTAL_CD AS SOLD_TO_POSTAL_CD,
 ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
 ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
FROM 
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N'
UNION 
SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH WHERE  (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN (
SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE COUNTRY_MATCH='N'))ENRICH
/*LEFT JOIN       
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT' 
  AND HIBERNATION_FLG = 'Y'
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ORDER BY BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT ) = 1 
 ) SYSVIEW_DRR
    ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = SYSVIEW_DRR.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE= SYSVIEW_DRR.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE */
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM /*Removed join with NPOS for getting disti id. Now getting disti id directly from NBM*/
      ON ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
      AND ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
      AND ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE   
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NCBM 
  ON ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NCBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NCBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  AND ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NCBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SHIPTO SHIP_TO 
  ON NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SHIP_TO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST END_CUST
  ON NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH
  ON NCBM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY SHIP_TO_CTRY 
  ON SHIP_TO_CTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = SHIP_TO.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY END_CUST_CTRY 
  ON END_CUST_CTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
  ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY SHARE_CTRY  
  ON SHARE_CTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO SOLD_TO 
  ON NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SOLD_TO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY SOLD_TO_CTRY 
  ON SOLD_TO_CTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = SOLD_TO.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
